_readme: One entry per person. companies: list of board names from config.json, or ['all']. filters: optional per-user override — any key omitted falls back to the global filters in config.json; set a key to '' to disable that filter for this user. watchlist: optional regex matched against company AND title — hits arrive as a separate gold 🔥 embed ahead of the normal batch. discord_mention: optional raw mention string (e.g. '<@123456789>' — your Discord user id) pinged on watchlist hits. ops: true → get an alert when a board has been failing 10+ polls. digest: true → daily 📊 summary at digest_hour_utc (config.json). Delivery: discord_webhook — use 'env:SECRET_NAME' and store the actual webhook URL as a GitHub Actions secret (Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions) so it never sits in the repo; a raw URL also works but is visible to anyone with repo access. Get the URL from Server Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. telegram_chat_id: create a bot with @BotFather, have the friend message it once, read chat id from api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates; export TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN on the server. mute: true disables a user without deleting them.
